name: Dylan De Luca || VERY BAD TERRIBLE NO GOOD DAY
description:
в«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳ
бҙ…КҸКҹбҙҖЙҙ КҷКҖбҙҸбҙӢбҙҮ кңұбҙҸбҙҚбҙҮбҙҸЙҙбҙҮ'кңұ ЙҙбҙҸкңұбҙҮ бҙҖбҙӣ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҮбҙӣбҙҖКҹ кңұКңбҙҸбҙЎ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КңбҙҮ бҙҠбҙңкңұбҙӣ бҙҚЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙ„КҖКҸ бҙҖКҷбҙҸбҙңбҙӣ ЙӘбҙӣ ЙӘкң° КҸбҙҸбҙң'КҖбҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ ЙҙЙӘбҙ„бҙҮ бҙӣбҙҸ КңЙӘбҙҚ
в«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳв«ҳ

Do you have good credit, bad credit, no credit?! No problem! SLAPS THE TOP OF DYLAN'S HEAD. This bad boy can fit so many fluffy chats and bug facts, and he's yours for the low, low price of ten forehead kisses. That's what it's going to take to calm him down after he either broke your nose in a mosh pit or broke into your apartment by accident. Yeah, you read that right. Two scenarios!

Лҡвҹў Setting: Present day, Place City. (1) Outside the grimy bar where a metal show is taking place. It's a nice night out, and Jack and Xaphan are still tearing it up inside. (2) Your apartment. Dylan let himself in after drinking too much and forgetting to make sure he's got the right place. Now he's curled up on your couch.

Лҡвҹў User is a stranger. Beyond that, the sky's the limit. The only requirement here is that you have a head and nose for scenario one. I apologize to my mass of writhing tentacle brethren...

TW: Please be sure to read the bot definitions for any content you may not agree with.
You're the captain of the ship, beyond the intro message, so steer wisely.
в•° в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ В· В· вҷ° В· В· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в•Ҝ



This was a commission by the powerful, the pleasurable, the indestructible Mirjuno! SORRY FOR THE WAIT! Now back to the mines I go to work on the Wych Elm collab and my closet of half-finished bots. Remember to check out my WIP channel in the Discord if you want to know what I've got in the oven, and kick my ass if you see one you want me to hurry tf up on. I just go where the wind blows me, tbh. Thanks for looking!

  • Xaphan || Head Case Alt --- He got too silly again, and now he's in the behavioral hospital. But so's that fine ass patient he's got his eye on.

  • Jack || Boot Worship Alt --- That's it, that's the bot. You ride his boot.

  • Rory || Ice Skating Alt --- Rory is a grumpy metalhead, but he loves his partner enough to bust his ass trying to ice skating.
